name: Norwegian Companies House
description: Look up any of 500,000+ Norwegian companies — board members, CEO, financials, industry codes. Data from Brønnøysundregistrene.

endpoints.description: Full company details by organization number
Find companies by board member or CEO name

details:
Data sourced from Brønnøysundregistrene (the Norwegian Register of Business Enterprises). Updated regularly. Covers all active Norwegian companies including AS, ASA, NUF, ENK, and more.

Returns structured JSON with company name, type, registration date, address, industry codes (NACE), number of employees, board members, CEO, and financial data where available.

name: bhrefs — SEO Tools
tagline: Backlink discovery and competitive analysis for AI agents
description: Backlink discovery, competitive gap analysis, and email enrichment for AI agents. Powered by Common Crawl data.

endpoints.description: Get all backlinks for a domain
Unique referring domains with authority scores

details:
Built on Common Crawl data, refreshed periodically. Provides backlink profiles, referring domain lists with authority scoring, and competitive gap analysis.

Designed for AI agents doing SEO research, link prospecting, and competitive analysis. All responses are structured JSON.

name: Aurora — Norwegian Weather Intelligence
tagline: Weather forecasts, marine data, and alerts for Norway and Scandinavian waters
description: Weather forecasts, marine data, and alerts for Norway and Scandinavian waters. Powered by MET Norway. Pay per query with USDC via x402.

endpoints.description: Weather forecast for a coordinate in Norway/Scandinavia
Weather forecast by Norwegian city name
Marine forecast for Scandinavian waters (waves, wind, currents)
Active weather alerts and warnings for Norway

free_endpoints.description: List of 50 Norwegian cities with coordinates (free, no payment required)

details:
Data sourced from MET Norway (Meteorologisk institutt), public domain / CC BY 4.0. Aurora caches responses for 30 min (forecast), 1 hr (marine), and 5 min (alerts).

Coverage: latitude 55–81°N, longitude −10 to 35°E — covering mainland Norway, Svalbard, Jan Mayen, and Scandinavian waters.

The /cities endpoint is free and returns a geocoding list of 50 Norwegian cities, useful for discovering valid city names for the /forecast/city endpoint.

name: Norwegian Statistics & Economics
tagline: Exchange rates, population, CPI, GDP from SSB and Norges Bank
description: Economic and demographic data for Norway — exchange rates from Norges Bank, population statistics, CPI, and GDP from Statistics Norway (SSB). Pay per query with USDC via x402.

name: Norwegian Property & Address
tagline: Address search, geocoding, elevation, and property data from Kartverket
description: Norwegian address lookup, geocoding, elevation profiles, and property registry data. Powered by Kartverket (Norwegian Mapping Authority). Pay per query with USDC via x402.

name: Norwegian IP Search
tagline: Trademarks, patents, and designs from Patentstyret
description: Search Norwegian trademarks, patents, and industrial designs. Data from Patentstyret (Norwegian Industrial Property Office). Pay per query with USDC via x402.

name: Norwegian Transport
tagline: Journey planning, departures, and stops from Entur
description: Norwegian public transport — journey planning, real-time departures, and stop information. Powered by Entur. Pay per query with USDC via x402.
